description: Abstract parent for the three discrepancy classes (Multi-Source, Drift, Confidence). First-class divergence entity (Saeule 1 — Multi-Truth). Created by the central discrepancy-engine, never edge-sourced — therefore no delivery/scope/promotion wire-contract. Carries the v7 lifecycle: open -> resolved | accepted_known_divergence | escalated | superseded (Konzept §17.2).

attributes.name: resolution_mode
attributes.description: Closure mode once terminal; null while open

attributes.name: resolution_note
attributes.description: Steward rationale for the closure decision

attributes.name: steward_domain
attributes.description: Owning steward domain — domain-separation enforced for MVP (§16)

attributes.name: assigned_to
attributes.description: Person/role the discrepancy is assigned to

attributes.name: business_impact
attributes.description: Estimated business impact for steward prioritization (§17.4)

attributes.name: recurrence_key
attributes.description: Stable signature for pattern-mining of repeated discrepancies — feeds auto-resolve-rule suggestion (§17.3 path 1)

attributes.name: detected_at
attributes.description: When the detector first raised it

attributes.name: resolved_at
attributes.description: When it reached a terminal state

attributes.name: audit_ref
attributes.description: Hash-chain ref into the vault (vault-hashchain) for the resolution event

relationships.description: Newer discrepancy that overtook this one (§17.2 superseded)
Auto-resolve rule that closed it, if any (§17.3 path 1)
